description: An in-game action-RPG screenshot of the iconic Three Kingdoms scene where Guan Yu rides his Red Hare warhorse through a torrential-rain battlefield and charges toward the enemy general Yan Liang. Rendered in the cinematic photoreal style of Black Myth: Wukong, Unreal Engine 5, third-person tracking camera from behind-and-left of the mounted hero. Full boss-fight HUD (portrait, minimap with dense enemy dots, skill hotbar with a finisher prompt, floating boss HP bar on the enemy general) turns the scene into a AAA ARPG combat moment. Tuned for gpt-image-2 at 16:9.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 《Black Myth: Wukong》风格的三国题材ARPG游戏截图，展现关羽骑赤兔马在暴雨战场冲向敌将颜良的经典场景，采用Unreal Engine 5渲染，第三人称视角，包含完整Boss战HUD界面。16:9比例，适配gpt-image-2。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 《Black Myth: Wukong》風格的三國題材ARPG遊戲截圖，呈現關羽騎赤兔馬在暴雨戰場衝向敵將顏良的經典場景，採用Unreal Engine 5渲染，第三人稱視角，包含完整Boss戰HUD介面。16:9比例，適配gpt-image-2。
description_i18n.ja: 《Black Myth: Wukong》スタイルのThree Kingdoms題材ARPGスクリーンショット。関羽が赤兎馬に乗り豪雨の戦場で敵将顔良へ突撃する名場面を、Unreal Engine 5で三人称視点レンダリング。Boss戦HUD完備、16:9、gpt-image-2対応。
description_i18n.ko: 《Black Myth: Wukong》 스타일의 Three Kingdoms ARPG 게임 스크린샷. 관우가 적토마를 타고 폭우 속 전장에서 적장 안량을 향해 돌격하는 명장면을 Unreal Engine 5로 3인칭 시점 렌더링. Boss전 HUD 완비, 16:9, gpt-image-2 최적화.
description_i18n.de: ARPG-Screenshot im Stil von Black Myth: Wukong zeigt die ikonische Three Kingdoms-Szene, in der Guan Yu auf seinem Schlachtross durch den Regen auf General Yan Liang zustürmt. Unreal Engine 5, Third-Person-Ansicht mit vollständigem Boss-Kampf-HUD, 16:9 für gpt-image-2.
description_i18n.fr: Capture ARPG dans le style de Black Myth: Wukong montrant la scène iconique de Three Kingdoms où Guan Yu charge le général Yan Liang sous la pluie sur son destrier. Rendu Unreal Engine 5, vue third-person avec HUD de combat de boss complet, 16:9 pour gpt-image-2.
description_i18n.ru: ARPG-скриншот в стиле Black Myth: Wukong, показывающий культовую сцену Three Kingdoms, где Гуань Юй на боевом коне мчится сквозь ливень к вражескому генералу Янь Ляну. Unreal Engine 5, вид от третьего лица с полным HUD боя с боссом, 16:9 для gpt-image-2.
description_i18n.es: Captura ARPG al estilo de Black Myth: Wukong que muestra la escena icónica de Three Kingdoms donde Guan Yu carga bajo la lluvia torrencial hacia el general Yan Liang. Renderizado Unreal Engine 5, cámara tercera persona con HUD completo de combate de jefe, 16:9 para gpt-image-2.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Captura ARPG no estilo de Black Myth: Wukong mostrando a cena icônica de Three Kingdoms onde Guan Yu cavalga sob chuva torrencial contra o general Yan Liang. Renderizado Unreal Engine 5, câmera terceira pessoa com HUD completo de combate contra chefe, 16:9 para gpt-image-2.
description_i18n.it: Screenshot ARPG in stile Black Myth: Wukong che mostra la scena iconica di Three Kingdoms in cui Guan Yu carica sotto la pioggia torrenziale verso il generale Yan Liang. Render Unreal Engine 5, visuale terza persona con HUD completo di combattimento boss, 16:9 per gpt-image-2.
description_i18n.vi: Ảnh chụp ARPG phong cách Black Myth: Wukong thể hiện cảnh kinh điển Three Kingdoms với Quan Vũ cưỡi Xích Thố xông vào trận mưa lớn tấn công tướng địch Nhan Lương. Render Unreal Engine 5, góc nhìn thứ ba với HUD chiến đấu boss đầy đủ, 16:9 cho gpt-image-2.
description_i18n.pl: Zrzut ARPG w stylu Black Myth: Wukong pokazujący ikoniczną scenę Three Kingdoms, gdzie Guan Yu mknie na bojowym rumaku przez ulewny deszcz ku generałowi Yan Liangowi. Render Unreal Engine 5, widok trzeciej osoby z pełnym HUD walki z bossem, 16:9 dla gpt-image-2.
description_i18n.id: Screenshot ARPG bergaya Black Myth: Wukong yang menampilkan adegan ikonik Three Kingdoms di mana Guan Yu menunggangi kuda perang menerobos hujan deras menuju jenderal musuh Yan Liang. Render Unreal Engine 5, kamera orang ketiga dengan HUD pertarungan boss lengkap, 16:9 untuk gpt-image-2.
description_i18n.nl: ARPG-screenshot in de stijl van Black Myth: Wukong van de iconische Three Kingdoms-scène waarin Guan Yu op zijn strijdros door stromende regen op generaal Yan Liang afstormt. Unreal Engine 5-render, derde persoon perspectief met volledige boss-gevecht HUD, 16:9 voor gpt-image-2.
description_i18n.ar: لقطة شاشة ARPG بأسلوب Black Myth: Wukong تُظهر المشهد الأيقوني من Three Kingdoms حيث يندفع Guan Yu على حصانه عبر أمطار غزيرة نحو الجنرال Yan Liang. رسومات Unreal Engine 5، منظور الشخص الثالث مع واجهة HUD كاملة لمعركة الزعيم، 16:9 لـ gpt-image-2.
description_i18n.tr: Black Myth: Wukong tarzında ARPG ekran görüntüsü, Guan Yu'nun savaş atıyla şiddetli yağmur altında düşman general Yan Liang'a hücum ettiği Three Kingdoms sahnesini gösteriyor. Unreal Engine 5 render, üçüncü şahıs kamera açısı ve tam boss savaşı HUD'u, 16:9 gpt-image-2 için.
description_i18n.uk: ARPG-скріншот у стилі Black Myth: Wukong, що показує культову сцену Three Kingdoms, де Гуань Юй на бойовому коні мчить крізь зливу до ворожого генерала Янь Ляна. Рендер Unreal Engine 5, вигляд від третьої особи з повним HUD бою з босом, 16:9 для gpt-image-2.
description_i18n.en: An in-game action-RPG screenshot of the iconic Three Kingdoms scene where Guan Yu rides his Red Hare warhorse through a torrential-rain battlefield and charges toward the enemy general Yan Liang. Rendered in the cinematic photoreal style of Black Myth: Wukong, Unreal Engine 5, third-person tracking camera from behind-and-left of the mounted hero. Full boss-fight HUD (portrait, minimap with dense enemy dots, skill hotbar with a finisher prompt, floating boss HP bar on the enemy general) turns the scene into a AAA ARPG combat moment. Tuned for gpt-image-2 at 16:9.

query.en:
In-game screenshot from a next-gen action RPG in the style of Black Myth Wukong, Unreal Engine 5 Nanite/Lumen quality. Third-person gameplay camera, tracking from behind and slightly left of the player character as he rides at full gallop.

# Playable character
{argument name="character" default="Guan Yu, a Three Kingdoms legendary general. Towering broad-shouldered figure with a crimson-tinted complexion, long flowing black beard reaching his chest, stern phoenix eyes narrowed, single topknot with gold band. Wearing deep green lamellar armor with gold trim, a massive red-crimson silk cloak billowing dramatically behind him"}.

# Mount and weapon
Riding {argument name="mount" default="the legendary blood-red Red Hare warhorse"} mid-gallop, his boots braced in ornate stirrups. Holding overhead {argument name="weapon" default="the Blue Dragon Crescent Glaive, a massive curved-blade polearm glowing with faint blue dragon-energy runes"}.

# Setting
{argument name="setting" default="A stormy muddy battlefield in heavy torrential rain, diagonal rain streaks visible throughout the frame. Thousands of enemy soldiers in dark armor formation parting in panic ahead of him, tall red battle banners with calligraphy characters being trampled, a golden-armored enemy general visible in the middle-distance turning with shock. Dark grey storm clouds with dramatic lightning flashes on the horizon, muddy water splashing from the horse's hooves."}

# IN-GAME HUD OVERLAY (clean semi-transparent dark backgrounds, polished game-studio UI)
- Upper-left corner: circular portrait of the bearded character with a red vertical HP bar and blue qi-energy bar, name in Chinese calligraphy font above.
- Upper-right corner: small round minimap with densely packed red enemy dots and one larger orange diamond marker.
- Lower-left: 4 circular skill icons with Chinese characters, cooldown rings, one glowing brightly ready to use.
- Lower-center: a narrow button prompt with thin red border indicating a special finisher combat move.
- Lower-right: stamina ring filling up as he charges.
- Center-top: a floating lock-on reticle over the distant enemy general's head with small text label and a boss-style HP bar filling the upper-middle third of the screen, crimson-red colored with a tag indicating Elite enemy.

# Rendering
Photorealistic PBR materials, detailed wet green armor reflecting rain and lightning, individual horse mane and tail hairs flying, muddy splash particles, volumetric rain and mist fog, cinematic but with clear gameplay-style third-person framing. Dark moody palette with occasional strobing lightning rim-light on the hero, red cloak luminous against the grey storm. Clean HUD in game-studio polish aesthetic.

Aspect ratio 16:9 landscape.

# Negative prompt
no watermark, no studio logos, no warped Chinese characters, no fake gibberish glyphs, no movie-cutscene framing, no first-person view, no anime cel-shading, no low-res UI, no duplicated HUD widgets, no extra fingers on the character, no modern clothing, no firearms, no generic Western fantasy look, no cluttered or overlapping UI panels, no broken horse anatomy, no signature.

# Playable character
{argument name="character" default="Guan Yu, a Three Kingdoms legendary general. - Upper-right corner: small round minimap with densely packed red enemy dots and one larger orange diamond marker.

Dark moody palette with occasional strobing lightning rim-light on the hero, red cloak luminous against the grey storm. Clean HUD in game-studio polish aesthetic.
